message:
fix(sandbox): resolve nested missing write paths through nearest ancestor

Replace the single-parent canonicalize fallback in FsCapabilityGate
with resolve_policy_path(), which walks up the ancestor chain to find
the nearest existing directory. This aligns WASI fs access checks with
the host sandbox path resolution logic, so deeply nested writes like
/allowed/a/b/c/new.txt are correctly permitted when /allowed/ is in
the writable roots — previously only /allowed/new.txt would pass.

Adds test_fs_capability_gate_check_access_nested_missing_write_allowed
verifying the fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
